# Sarvesh Talele

> AI Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services and Claude Certified Architect (Anthropic). Builds agentic AI systems, multi-agent workflows, Graph-RAG pipelines, and secure enterprise LLM infrastructure. This site is a personal portfolio and Claude certification resource hub — every page is content-derived from Markdown/MDX and kept current.

## Key pages

- [About](https://sarveshtalele.org/about): Background, personal story, impact stats, skills dashboard, education, certifications, achievements.
- [Claude](https://sarveshtalele.org/claude): Claude Certified Architect badges (Foundations + Professional), a free CCAR-F mock exam, exam-prep guides, and products.
- [CCAR-F Mock Exam](https://sarveshtalele.org/claude/quiz): A free 60-question practice exam for the Claude Certified Architect – Foundations exam, with a timed mock mode and an untimed practice mode with full explanations (unofficial; not affiliated with Anthropic).
- [Foundations exam guide](https://sarveshtalele.org/claude/foundations): Preparing for the Claude Foundation (CCAR-F) exam — blueprint, five domains, six scenarios, and a study plan.
- [Projects](https://sarveshtalele.org/projects): Live GitHub repositories, filterable by concept category (Agentic AI, MCP, RAG, AI Projects, Machine Learning, Claude Skills, Developer Tools).
- [Publications](https://sarveshtalele.org/publications): Peer-reviewed and internal research, with Google Scholar and ORCID links.
- [Experience](https://sarveshtalele.org/experience): Career timeline.
- [Contact](https://sarveshtalele.org/contact): Book time directly via Topmate, or reach out by email, LinkedIn, GitHub, Medium, Google Scholar, ORCID.

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

- Content updates automatically as Markdown/MDX files are added — this file reflects the site's structure, not a point-in-time snapshot.
- On-site search: https://sarveshtalele.org/search
- Sitemap: https://sarveshtalele.org/sitemap-index.xml
- Canonical identity: GitHub https://github.com/sarveshtalele · LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarveshtalele · Google Scholar https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ls5WYe8AAAAJ&hl=en · ORCID https://orcid.org/0009-0002-0818-461X
